_source: Warhammer Community faction focus articles, Goonhammer reviews

GLADIUS TASK FORCE._engine_note: Combat Doctrines: Devastator (shoot after Advance), Tactical (shoot+charge after Fall Back), Assault (charge after Advance). Each used once per battle. Cannot be modelled as always-on modifier — rotational doctrine system.

BLADE OF ULTRAMAR._engine_note: Enhanced Combat Doctrines — same as Gladius but with Calgar can reuse a Doctrine. Requires specific character. Cannot be modelled as universal modifier.

CERAMITE SENTINELS._engine_note: Competitive detachment — specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.

STORMLANCE TASK FORCE._engine_note: Lightning Assault: all units can Advance and charge, Fall Back and charge. Always-on army-wide mobility buff.

choices.name: Lightning Assault
choices.description: All Adeptus Astartes units can Advance and charge, and Fall Back and charge.

ARMOURED SPEARTIP._engine_note: Rapid Deployment: units disembarking from Transport that Normal/Advanced can make D6" move. Positional mechanic — cannot modelled as universal DPP/SURV modifier.

IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD._engine_note: Armoured Wrath: re-roll one Hit OR Wound OR Damage roll per unit per phase (ranged and melee). Conditional re-roll — modelled as reroll_1s for approximation.

choices.name: Armoured Wrath
choices.description: All Adeptus Astartes units re-roll Hit rolls of 1 and Wound rolls of 1 (one each per phase).

FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE._engine_note: Close-Range Eradication: all ranged weapons gain ASSAULT, +1 Strength within 12". ASSAULT is mobility; +1S within 12" is conditional.

choices.name: Close-Range Eradication
choices.description: All ranged weapons gain ASSAULT. Ranged weapons gain +1 Strength when targeting units within 12".
choices._engine_note: +1S within 12" modelled as flat +1S for DPP approximation (underestimates at range, overestimates in melee).

VANGUARD SPEARHEAD._engine_note: Shadow Masters: ranged attacks target your unit get -1 Hit and Benefit of Cover if attacker 12"+. Defensive buff — affects SURV.

choices.name: Shadow Masters
choices.description: All Adeptus Astartes units have Stealth (-1 to hit from ranged attacks beyond 12").

1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE._engine_note: Extremis-Level Threat: once per battle, army can re-roll Wound rolls vs Oath of Moment target. One-use ability — cannot modelled as always-on.

ANVIL SIEGE FORCE._engine_note: Shield of the Imperium: all ranged weapons gain HEAVY. Weapons with HEAVY already get +1 to Wound when stationary. HEAVY bonus is conditional on being stationary.

choices.name: Shield of the Imperium
choices.description: All ranged weapons gain HEAVY. Weapons that already have HEAVY get +1 to Wound when the unit Remained Stationary.
choices._engine_note: Modelled as Heavy bonus always active (overestimates — requires being stationary).

HAMMER OF AVERNII._engine_note: Enhanced Oath of Moment: army re-roll hits vs Oath target, +1 to wound vs Oath target. Strong always-on buff against designated target.

choices.name: Enhanced Oath of Moment
choices.description: All Adeptus Astartes units re-roll Hit rolls and get +1 to Wound vs the Oath of Moment target.
choices._engine_note: Modelled as full reroll + +1 wound (overestimates — only vs Oath target).

HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE._engine_note: Target Sighted: Vehicles gain Tank Ace (auto-Advance 6", re-roll Damage if didn't Advance). Vehicle-specific buff.

choices.name: Target Sighted
choices.description: Adeptus Astartes Vehicles re-roll Damage rolls (if they didn't Advance this turn).
choices._engine_note: Modelled as reroll damage for Vehicles (overestimates — requires not Advancing).

ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE._engine_note: Rapid-Drop Deployment: non-Titanic units gain Deep Strike. Units set up this turn re-roll Wound rolls of 1. Conditional on arriving from reserves.

choices.name: Rapid-Drop
choices.description: Units re-roll Wound rolls of 1 on the turn they arrive from reserves.
choices._engine_note: Modelled as always-on reroll wounds 1s (overestimates — only on arrival turn).

SHADOWMARK TALON._engine_note: Masters of Shadow: ranged attacks targeting your unit get -1 Hit and Benefit of Cover if attacker 12"+. Same as Vanguard Spearhead.

choices.name: Masters of Shadow
choices.description: All Adeptus Astartes units have Stealth (-1 to hit from ranged attacks beyond 12").

LIBRARIUS CONCLAVE._engine_note: Psychic Disciplines: pick one at battle round start for PSYKER units — Biomancy (+2" M), Divination (re-roll 1s hit+wound), Pyromancy (+1 AP within 12"), Telekinesis (ranged -1 S vs this unit), Telepathy (ignore BS modifiers). Rotational choice — modelled as best option.

choices.name: Divination
choices.description: PSYKER units re-roll Hit rolls of 1 and Wound rolls of 1 (Divination discipline).
choices._engine_note: Modelled as best offensive option (Divination). Other disciplines provide utility/mobility.

SUBVERSION ASSETS._engine_note: Nowhere to Hide: PHOBOS and SCOUT SQUAD units get detection abilities. Niche utility — no DPP/SURV modifier.

FULGURIS TASK FORCE._engine_note: Skystrike: LAND SPEEDER/STORM SPEEDER units gain SPEEDER keyword and turn 1 ingress. Speeder-specific buff — limited unit pool.

RECLAMATION FORCE._engine_note: Ultramarines-themed detachment — specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.

EMPEROR'S SHIELD._engine_note: Imperial Fists-themed detachment — specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.

FORGEFATHER'S SEEKERS._engine_note: Salamanders-themed detachment — melta/flamer focus. Specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.

SPEARPOINT TASK FORCE._engine_note: White Scars-themed detachment — fast/melee focus. Specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.

BASTION TASK FORCE._engine_note: Specific rule details needed from faction pack PDF.
